content.text: {"component":"billing","summary":"Billing reads as a governed Symfony 8 billing subsystem with strong QA and documentation depth; minor gaps remain in observability, security scanning, and docs publishing alignment.","strengths":["Symfony 8 + PHP 8.4 targeting with clear billing domain focus","Multi-lane tests (unit, integration, contract, Panther, Playwright) and strong static analysis (phpstan, deptrac)","Doctrine-backed persistence with migrations and operational indexes","API contract posture with Swagger-PHP and explicit API versioning/error-contract docs","Governance signals (CODEOWNERS, PR template, quality gates, Qodana) and rich internal docs"],"risks":["Docs publishing path appears misaligned with registry (.antora-src vs docs/modules)","No explicit observability/metrics/tracing or deployment manifests evidenced","Security scanning (e.g., dependency and secret scans) not evidenced in repo","Release tagging absent (no exact git tags)"],"next_actions":["Align Antora source/report path with docs/modules or update registry report_path","Extend CI to run composer audit and npm/audit-equivalent and publish OpenAPI artifact","Introduce baseline observability (structured logging, correlation ID) and metrics/tracing hooks","Add container/Kubernetes or runtime deployment manifests, or document deployment path","Adopt release tagging and changelog automation in CI","Ensure CI runs phpstan, deptrac, phpunit, and Playwright lanes with gating"],"notes":["Scores refreshed from repository evidence where justified; unchanged areas retain prior narrative with minor refinements.","Security posture is inferred from present configs and docs only; no secret/dependency scanners were found in-tree."],"confidence":"medium","evidence_paths":["composer.json","README.md","deptrac.yaml","phpstan.neon.dist","phpunit.xml.dist","playwright.config.js","tests/unit","tests/Integration","tests/Contract","tests/e2e","docs/antora.yml","docs/api-versioning.md","docs/api-error-contract.md","docs/billing-boundary.md","docs/operations","docs/testing-strategy.md","qodana.yaml",".github/workflows",".github/CODEOWNERS",".github/pull_request_template.md","config/services.yaml","public/index.php","migrations/005_add_operational_indexes_and_timestamps.sql"],"suggested_score_overrides":{"product":8.8,"architecture":8.6,"runtime":8.5,"qa":9.0,"ops":8.7,"market":8.7,"overall":8.7},"metric_updates":{"product":{"summary":"A clear billing-focused product identity is documented and reinforced by API versioning, error contracts, and boundary docs.","risks":["Assessment remains pre-RC seeded and should continue to be refreshed by scheduled scans.","Docs publishing path may be misaligned with registry, risking stale or missing owner-facing pages."],"improvements":["Keep API/feature narratives synchronized across README and docs/* to reduce drift.","Publish and link the generated OpenAPI spec within the docs site for a cohesive product surface."],"evidence":["composer.json","README.md","docs/billing-boundary.md","docs/api-versioning.md","docs/api-error-contract.md"]},"architecture":{"summary":"Layered Symfony architecture with Doctrine and deptrac-enforced boundaries is evident across src/* and configuration.","risks":["Domain boundary enforcement depends on deptrac coverage; gaps could allow silent drift.","No explicit module packaging or bounded-context segregation beyond directories is evidenced."],"improvements":["Sustain deptrac coverage and address uncovered/unused rules to prevent canon drift.","Extend docs/architecture with updated component diagrams reflecting current packages and flows."],"evidence":["deptrac.yaml","src/Controller","src/Infrastructure","src/Service","docs/architecture"]},"runtime":{"summary":"Symfony runtime, environment configs, migrations, and test DB tooling provide a real application surface.","risks":["No deployment manifests (container/Kubernetes) or runtime observability hooks are evidenced.","Operational readiness for health/readiness probes and correlation may be incomplete."],"improvements":["Add readiness/liveness endpoints and request correlation to improve operability.","Introduce container/Kubernetes manifests or document deployment steps in docs/operations."],"evidence":["public/index.php","config/services.yaml",".env",".env.test","migrations/001_create_invoices.sql","tools/test-db-start.sh"]},"qa":{"summary":"Strong multi-lane verification posture: unit/integration/contract/e2e with phpstan, deptrac, and Playwright/Panther.","risks":["CI workflow specifics are not visible here; tests and static analysis may not be gating.","phpunit.xml is provided as .dist; ensure environment parity in CI and local runs."],"improvements":["Ensure .github/workflows execute phpstan, deptrac, phpunit, and Playwright with fail-the-build gating.","Track and publish coverage and static-analysis budgets in docs/quality-gates.md."],"evidence":["composer.json","phpunit.xml.dist","phpstan.neon.dist","deptrac.yaml","tests","playwright.config.js","docs/testing-strategy.md","docs/quality-gates.md"]},"ops":{"summary":"Governance and quality gates are present (CODEOWNERS, PR template, Qodana, operations docs), but observability and security scans are not evidenced.","risks":["Missing explicit dependency/secret scanning and observability instrumentation reduce operational confidence.","Docs site source path mismatch may impair report publishing."],"improvements":["Add composer audit and secret/dependency scans in CI and surface results in PRs.","Introduce minimal metrics/tracing/logging and document runbooks in docs/operations.","Align Antora pathing or registry report_path to ensure report publishing."],"evidence":[".github/CODEOWNERS",".github/pull_request_template.md",".github/workflows","qodana.yaml","docs/operations","docs/security"]},"market":{"summary":"Docs and API contracts position the component toward recurring billing/subscription flows with clear error and versioning posture.","risks":["Docs publishing misalignment may limit external discoverability.","Public packaging/distribution positioning is not explicit in-repo."],"improvements":["Publish OpenAPI artifact to docs/modules and link it from README for easier adoption.","Clarify consumer integration paths and supported scenarios in docs/billing-boundary.md."],"evidence":["docs/api-versioning.md","docs/api-error-contract.md","docs/billing-boundary.md","README.md"]},"overall":{"summary":"A strong pre-RC billing subsystem with deep QA and clear architecture; slight reductions reflect missing observability/security scanning and docs-path drift.","risks":["Operational gaps (observability/scanning) and release tagging absence lower RC confidence.","Docs/report publishing path drift could hide progress from stakeholders."],"improvements":["Close the observability and security-scanning gaps and align docs publishing to move confidently to RC.","Adopt release tagging and CI gating across QA lanes to stabilize RC cadence."],"evidence":[".github/workflows","qodana.yaml","docs/operations","docs/antora.yml","composer.json","tests","deptrac.yaml"]}}}
